description: parse_id_map returns IdMapEntry records from SruDbIdMapTable
steps: Build a minimal synthetic ESE database with an IdMapTable leaf page containing 2 entries
Verify Ok is returned with 2 IdMapEntry values
Verify id and name fields match encoded values (e.g., id=42, name='explorer.exe')

description: IdMapEntry name is a UTF-16LE decoded string
steps: Encode a name as UTF-16LE bytes in the synthetic page
Call parse_id_map and inspect the name field
Verify the name string matches the original Unicode text
